Usage:
  circleci settings telemetry enable [flags]

Examples:
# Opt in to telemetry
$ circleci settings telemetry enable

# Opt in using a custom config file path
$ circleci --config ~/.config/circleci/config.yml settings telemetry enable

# Verify the stored preference after enabling
$ circleci settings list --json


Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected
